# SpecTrace

> AI-readable bootstrap for the `spec-trace` reference repository. This file is non-authoritative. The canonical standard lives under [`./specs/requirements/spec-trace/`](./specs/requirements/spec-trace/).

`spec-trace` is a CUE-first requirements and traceability standard. Canonical authored artifacts are `.cue`; generated Markdown is a readable projection of those artifacts.

When working in this repository:

- follow this authority order: canonical SPEC suite, then shared CUE model and `.cue` templates, then generated Markdown and compatibility schemas, then root summaries and AI convenience files
- keep requirements inside specification artifacts
- author canonical artifacts in `.cue`, not Markdown, YAML, or JSON
- treat generated Markdown as read-only output
- use stable IDs for references and update referrers when an ID changes
- if your tool can only ingest a single file, generate a bundled Markdown view with [`./scripts/Export-SpecTraceBundle.ps1`](./scripts/Export-SpecTraceBundle.ps1)

## Canonical Standard

- [`_index.md`](./specs/requirements/spec-trace/_index.md): canonical entry point to the SPEC suite
- [`SPEC-STD.md`](./specs/requirements/spec-trace/SPEC-STD.md): core definitions, authority model, and publication rules
- [`SPEC-ID.md`](./specs/requirements/spec-trace/SPEC-ID.md): identifier policy
- [`SPEC-LIN.md`](./specs/requirements/spec-trace/SPEC-LIN.md): requirement lineage and evolution
- [`SPEC-PRF.md`](./specs/requirements/spec-trace/SPEC-PRF.md): repository conformance profiles
- [`SPEC-RPT.md`](./specs/requirements/spec-trace/SPEC-RPT.md): derived reporting dimensions and attestation semantics
- [`SPEC-LAY.md`](./specs/requirements/spec-trace/SPEC-LAY.md): repository layout guidance
- [`SPEC-TPL.md`](./specs/requirements/spec-trace/SPEC-TPL.md): canonical field model and generated Markdown rendering rules
- [`SPEC-SCH.md`](./specs/requirements/spec-trace/SPEC-SCH.md): schema and validation rules
- [`SPEC-EVD.md`](./specs/requirements/spec-trace/SPEC-EVD.md): generated evidence snapshots
- [`SPEC-EXM.md`](./specs/requirements/spec-trace/SPEC-EXM.md): worked-example expectations

## Shared Model And Templates

- [`model/README.md`](./model/README.md): canonical shared CUE package
- [`spec-template.cue`](./spec-template.cue): `templates.#SpecificationTemplate`
- [`architecture-template.cue`](./architecture-template.cue): `templates.#ArchitectureTemplate`
- [`work-item-template.cue`](./work-item-template.cue): `templates.#WorkItemTemplate`
- [`verification-template.cue`](./verification-template.cue): `templates.#VerificationTemplate`
- [`catalog/retired-requirements.cue`](./catalog/retired-requirements.cue): retired requirement ledger for lineage validation

## Commands

- [`scripts/Resolve-Cue.ps1`](./scripts/Resolve-Cue.ps1): install or locate the pinned CUE CLI
- [`scripts/Test-SpecTraceRepository.ps1`](./scripts/Test-SpecTraceRepository.ps1): validate canonical CUE artifacts
- [`scripts/Render-SpecTraceMarkdown.ps1`](./scripts/Render-SpecTraceMarkdown.ps1): generate or check Markdown output
- [`scripts/Build-SpecTraceCatalog.ps1`](./scripts/Build-SpecTraceCatalog.ps1): emit a repository-wide catalog as CUE and JSON
- [`scripts/Convert-MarkdownArtifactsToCue.ps1`](./scripts/Convert-MarkdownArtifactsToCue.ps1): migration helper
- [`scripts/Export-SpecTraceBundle.ps1`](./scripts/Export-SpecTraceBundle.ps1): bundle generated specification Markdown into a single file

## Worked Examples

- [`examples/README.md`](./examples/README.md): example index
- [`examples/payments/SPEC-PAY-ACH.md`](./examples/payments/SPEC-PAY-ACH.md): product-style example
- [`examples/calculator-int/SPEC-CALC-INT.md`](./examples/calculator-int/SPEC-CALC-INT.md): fuller technical example
- [`examples/arithmetic/SPEC-MATH-DIV.md`](./examples/arithmetic/SPEC-MATH-DIV.md): smallest end-to-end slice

## Compatibility Surfaces

- [`schemas/README.md`](./schemas/README.md): compatibility JSON Schema entry point
- [`artifact-id-policy.json`](./artifact-id-policy.json): compatibility identifier export

## AI Helpers

- [`AGENTS.md`](./AGENTS.md): repo-specific agent guide
- [`skills/README.md`](./skills/README.md): repo-local skill index
- [`artifact-model-explainer.md`](./artifact-model-explainer.md): plain-language artifact-family map
- [`profiles-and-attestation-explainer.md`](./profiles-and-attestation-explainer.md): plain-language profile and attestation guide
